mapper.select: SELECT sfid FROM (WITH TO_CHECK (sfid) AS (VALUES ${ids}) SELECT tc.sfid, NOT EXISTS (SELECT sfid FROM appcompanysync p WHERE p.sfid = tc.sfid) AS checked FROM to_check tc ) AS t WHERE t.checked = #{checked}

SELECT p.sfid, p.name, p.account, p.faretable, p.jtxcompanyid, p.appdisplayname, p.status, p.acceptmajor2, p.acceptminor2, p.dispatchtype, p.phonenumber, p.phonenumbercancel, p.email, p.warningemail, p.companylogoimage, p.area, p.areacode, p.salesprefecture, p.salescity, p.profile, p.cars, p.isenableclosing, p.displaysalescity, p.showdest, p.showmoving, p.showmustarrivaltime, p.showvisit, p.showbookingcancel, p.extendedfieldmap, p.closingtimefrom, p.closingtimeto, p.globallat, p.globallng, p.companynameen, p.displaysalescityen, p.pickupfeedescription, p.bookingfeedescription, p.partnerapiversion, p.showemptycar, p.ratingaverage, p.waitforpickupdefault, p.showminutestowaitforpickup, p.isradionumberedit, p.isexternalcancel, p.showimmediatecancel, p.netpaytypes, p.paymentmethod, p.minutestowaitforpickup, p.logoimage, p.replywatingminute, p.groupcompanies, p.communicationurl, p.orderurl, p.ordercancelurl, p.invaliddate, p.invalidreason, p.invaliddetailreason, p.drivercontract, p.implementationcosts, p.monthlyminimumcharge, p.monthlyminimumcars, p.remarks, p.payablecommission, p.requeststartdate, p.requestcompanyidrelation, p.bankaccount, p.bankaccount2, p.lastmodifieddate, p.www, p.paymentmethoden, p.salesprefectureen, p.destinationprefecture, p.destinationaddress, p.destinationpostalcode, p.destinationcontactname, p.destinationcompanyname, p.carimagecolor1, p.carimagecolor2, p.carimagecolor3, p.carimagecolor4, p.carimagecolor5, p.carimagecolor6, p.carimagecolor7, p.carimagecolor8, p.carimagename1, p.carimagename2, p.carimagename3, p.carimagename4, p.carimagename5, p.carimagename6, p.carimagename7, p.carimagename8 FROM appcompany p WHERE(date_trunc('second',p.lastmodifieddate) >=${startTime}) ORDER BY p.sfid DESC OFFSET ${offset} LIMIT ${limit}

SELECT p.sfid, p.name, p.account, p.faretable, p.jtxcompanyid, p.appdisplayname, p.status, p.acceptmajor2, p.acceptminor2, p.dispatchtype_isexternaldispatch as dispatchtypeisexternaldispatch, p.dispatchtype_partnerapiversion as dispatchtypepartnerapiversion, p.phonenumber, p.phonenumbercancel, p.email, p.warningemail, p.companylogoimage, p.areacode, p.salesprefecture, p.salescity, p.profile, p.cars, p.isenableclosing, p.displaysalescity, p.showdest, p.showmoving, p.showmustarrivaltime, p.showvisit, p.showbookingcancel, p.extendedfieldmap, p.closingtimefrom, p.closingtimeto, p.globallat, p.globallng, p.companynameen, p.displaysalescityen, p.pickupfeedescription, p.bookingfeedescription, p.partnerapiversion, p.showemptycar, p.ratingaverage, p.waitforpickupdefault, p.showminutestowaitforpickup, p.isradionumberedit, p.isexternalcancel, p.showimmediatecancel, p.netpaytypes, p.paymentmethod, p.minutestowaitforpickup, p.logoimage, p.replywatingminute, p.groupcompanies, p.communicationurl, p.orderurl, p.ordercancelurl, p.invaliddate, p.invalidreason, p.invaliddetailreason, p.drivercontract_dispatchmethodid as drivercontractdispatchmethodid, p.drivercontract_ispreviewenabled as drivercontractispreviewenabled, p.drivercontract_isenabled as drivercontractisenabled, p.drivercontract_useasdefault as drivercontractuseasdefault, p.drivercontract_onlyusewhennecessary as drivercontractonlyusewhennecessary, p.implementationcosts, p.monthlyminimumcharge, p.monthlyminimumcars, p.remarks, p.payablecommission, p.requeststartdate, p.requestcompanyidrelation, p.bankaccount, p.bankaccount2, p.www, p.paymentmethoden, p.salesprefectureen, p.destinationprefecture, p.destinationaddress, p.destinationpostalcode, p.destinationcontactname, p.destinationcompanyname, p.carimagecolor1, p.carimagecolor2, p.carimagecolor3, p.carimagecolor4, p.carimagecolor5, p.carimagecolor6, p.carimagecolor7, p.carimagecolor8, p.carimagename1, p.carimagename2, p.carimagename3, p.carimagename4, p.carimagename5, p.carimagename6, p.carimagename7, p.carimagename8 FROM appcompanysync p WHERE p.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY p.sfid DESC
SELECT count(p.sfid) AS rows FROM appcompany p WHERE (date_trunc('second', p.lastmodifieddate) >= ${startTime})

SELECT a.sfid, a.name, a.account, a.faretable, a.jtxcompanyid, a.appdisplayname, a.status, a.acceptmajor2, a.dispatchtype, a.phonenumber, a.phonenumbercancel, a.email, a.warningemail, a.companylogoimage, a.area, a.areacode, a.salesprefecture, a.salesprefectureen, a.salescity, a.profile, a.cars, a.isenableclosing, a.showdest, a.showmoving, a.showmustarrivaltime, a.showvisit, a.showbookingcancel, a.extendedfieldmap, a.closingtimefrom, a.closingtimeto, a.globallat, a.globallng, a.companynameen, a.displaysalescityen, a.pickupfeedescription, a.bookingfeedescription, a.partnerapiversion, a.showemptycar, a.ratingaverage, a.waitforpickupdefault, a.showminutestowaitforpickup, a.isradionumberedit, a.isexternalcancel, a.showimmediatecancel, a.netpaytypes, a.paymentmethod, a.paymentmethoden, a.minutestowaitforpickup, a.carimagecolor1, a.carimagecolor2, a.carimagecolor3, a.carimagecolor4, a.carimagecolor5, a.carimagecolor6, a.carimagecolor7, a.carimagecolor8, a.carimagename1, a.carimagename2, a.carimagename3, a.carimagename4, a.carimagename5, a.carimagename6, a.carimagename7, a.carimagename8, a.replywatingminute, a.groupcompanies, a.communicationurl, a.orderurl, a.ordercancelurl, a.invaliddate, a.invalidreason, a.invaliddetailreason, a.acceptminor2, a.logoimage, a.displaysalescity, a.drivercontract, a.implementationcosts, a.monthlyminimumcharge, a.monthlyminimumcars, a.remarks, a.payablecommission, a.requeststartdate, a.requestcompanyidrelation, a.bankaccount, a.bankaccount2, a.www, a.destinationprefecture, a.destinationaddress, a.destinationpostalcode, a.destinationcontactname, a.destinationcompanyname, a.lastmodifieddate FROM appcompany a WHERE a.sfid=#{id}
SELECT a.sfid FROM appcompany a WHERE a.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY a.sfid DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appcompany (sfid, name, account, faretable, jtxcompanyid, appdisplayname, status, acceptmajor2, dispatchtype, phonenumber, phonenumbercancel, email, warningemail, companylogoimage, area, areacode, salesprefecture, salesprefectureen, salescity, profile, cars, isenableclosing, showdest, showmoving, showmustarrivaltime, showvisit, showbookingcancel, extendedfieldmap, closingtimefrom, closingtimeto, globallat, globallng, companynameen, displaysalescityen, pickupfeedescription, bookingfeedescription, partnerapiversion, showemptycar, ratingaverage, waitforpickupdefault, showminutestowaitforpickup, isradionumberedit, isexternalcancel, showimmediatecancel, netpaytypes, paymentmethod, paymentmethoden, minutestowaitforpickup, carimagecolor1, carimagecolor2, carimagecolor3, carimagecolor4, carimagecolor5, carimagecolor6, carimagecolor7, carimagecolor8, carimagename1, carimagename2, carimagename3, carimagename4, carimagename5, carimagename6, carimagename7, carimagename8, replywatingminute, groupcompanies, communicationurl, orderurl, ordercancelurl, invaliddate, invalidreason, invaliddetailreason, acceptminor2, logoimage, displaysalescity, drivercontract, implementationcosts, monthlyminimumcharge, monthlyminimumcars, remarks, payablecommission, requeststartdate, requestcompanyidrelation, bankaccount, bankaccount2, www, destinationprefecture, destinationaddress, destinationpostalcode, destinationcontactname, destinationcompanyname, lastmodifieddate) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{name}, #{account}, #{faretable}, #{jtxcompanyid}, #{appdisplayname}, #{status}, #{acceptmajor2}, #{dispatchtype}, #{phonenumber}, #{phonenumbercancel}, #{email}, #{warningemail}, #{companylogoimage}, #{area}, #{areacode}, #{salesprefecture}, #{salesprefectureen}, #{salescity}, #{profile}, #{cars}, ${isenableclosing==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showdest==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showmoving==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showmustarrivaltime==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{showvisit}, ${showbookingcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{extendedfieldmap}, #{closingtimefrom}, #{closingtimeto}, #{globallat}, #{globallng}, #{companynameen}, #{displaysalescityen}, #{pickupfeedescription}, #{bookingfeedescription}, #{partnerapiversion}, ${showemptycar==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{ratingaverage}, #{waitforpickupdefault}, ${showminutestowaitforpickup==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${isradionumberedit==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${isexternalcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showimmediatecancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{netpaytypes}, #{paymentmethod}, #{paymentmethoden}, #{minutestowaitforpickup}, #{carimagecolor1}, #{carimagecolor2}, #{carimagecolor3}, #{carimagecolor4}, #{carimagecolor5}, #{carimagecolor6}, #{carimagecolor7}, #{carimagecolor8}, #{carimagename1}, #{carimagename2}, #{carimagename3}, #{carimagename4}, #{carimagename5}, #{carimagename6}, #{carimagename7}, #{carimagename8}, #{replywatingminute}, #{groupcompanies}, #{communicationurl}, #{orderurl}, #{ordercancelurl}, #{invaliddate}, #{invalidreason}, #{invaliddetailreason}, #{acceptminor2}, #{logoimage}, #{displaysalescity}, #{drivercontract}, #{implementationcosts}, #{monthlyminimumcharge}, #{monthlyminimumcars}, #{remarks}, #{payablecommission}, #{requeststartdate}, #{requestcompanyidrelation}, #{bankaccount}, #{bankaccount2}, #{www}, #{destinationprefecture}, #{destinationaddress}, #{destinationpostalcode}, #{destinationcontactname}, #{destinationcompanyname}, #{lastmodifieddate})
mapper.update: UPDATE appcompany SET name=#{name}, account=#{account}, jtxcompanyid=#{jtxcompanyid}, faretable=#{faretable}, appdisplayname=#{appdisplayname}, status=#{status}, acceptmajor2=#{acceptmajor2}, dispatchtype=#{dispatchtype}, phonenumber=#{phonenumber}, phonenumbercancel=#{phonenumbercancel}, email=#{email}, warningemail=#{warningemail}, companylogoimage=#{companylogoimage}, area=#{area}, areacode=#{areacode}, salesprefecture=#{salesprefecture}, salesprefectureen=#{salesprefectureen}, salescity=#{salescity}, profile=#{profile}, cars=#{cars}, isenableclosing=${isenableclosing==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showdest=${showdest==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showmoving=${showmoving==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showmustarrivaltime=${showmustarrivaltime==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showvisit=#{showvisit}, showbookingcancel=${showbookingcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, extendedfieldmap=#{extendedfieldmap}, closingtimefrom=#{closingtimefrom}, closingtimeto=#{closingtimeto}, globallat=#{globallat}, globallng=#{globallng}, companynameen=#{companynameen}, displaysalescityen=#{displaysalescityen}, pickupfeedescription=#{pickupfeedescription}, bookingfeedescription=#{bookingfeedescription}, partnerapiversion=#{partnerapiversion}, showemptycar=${showemptycar==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ratingaverage=#{ratingaverage}, waitforpickupdefault=#{waitforpickupdefault}, showminutestowaitforpickup=${showminutestowaitforpickup==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, isradionumberedit=${isradionumberedit==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, isexternalcancel=${isexternalcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showimmediatecancel=${showimmediatecancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, netpaytypes=#{netpaytypes}, paymentmethod=#{paymentmethod}, paymentmethoden=#{paymentmethoden}, minutestowaitforpickup=#{minutestowaitforpickup}, carimagecolor1=#{carimagecolor1}, carimagecolor2=#{carimagecolor2}, carimagecolor3=#{carimagecolor3}, carimagecolor4=#{carimagecolor4}, carimagecolor5=#{carimagecolor5}, carimagecolor6=#{carimagecolor6}, carimagecolor7=#{carimagecolor7}, carimagecolor8=#{carimagecolor8}, carimagename1=#{carimagename1}, carimagename2=#{carimagename2}, carimagename3=#{carimagename3}, carimagename4=#{carimagename4}, carimagename5=#{carimagename5}, carimagename6=#{carimagename6}, carimagename7=#{carimagename7}, carimagename8=#{carimagename8}, replywatingminute=#{replywatingminute}, groupcompanies=#{groupcompanies}, communicationurl=#{communicationurl}, orderurl=#{orderurl}, ordercancelurl=#{ordercancelurl}, invaliddate=#{invaliddate}, invalidreason=#{invalidreason}, invaliddetailreason=#{invaliddetailreason}, acceptminor2=#{acceptminor2}, logoimage=#{logoimage}, displaysalescity=#{displaysalescity}, drivercontract=#{drivercontract}, implementationcosts=#{implementationcosts}, monthlyminimumcharge=#{monthlyminimumcharge}, monthlyminimumcars=#{monthlyminimumcars}, remarks=#{remarks}, payablecommission=#{payablecommission}, requeststartdate=#{requeststartdate}, requestcompanyidrelation=#{requestcompanyidrelation}, bankaccount=#{bankaccount}, bankaccount2=#{bankaccount2}, www=#{www}, destinationprefecture=#{destinationprefecture}, destinationaddress=#{destinationaddress}, destinationpostalcode=#{destinationpostalcode}, destinationcontactname=#{destinationcontactname}, destinationcompanyname=#{destinationcompanyname}, lastmodifieddate=#{lastmodifieddate} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appcompanysync (sfid, name, account, faretable, jtxcompanyid, appdisplayname, status, acceptmajor2, dispatchtype_isexternaldispatch, dispatchtype_partnerapiversion, phonenumber, phonenumbercancel, email, warningemail, companylogoimage, areacode, salesprefecture, salesprefectureen, salescity, profile, cars, isenableclosing, showdest, showmoving, showmustarrivaltime, showvisit, showbookingcancel, extendedfieldmap, closingtimefrom, closingtimeto, globallat, globallng, companynameen, displaysalescityen, pickupfeedescription, bookingfeedescription, partnerapiversion, showemptycar, ratingaverage, waitforpickupdefault, showminutestowaitforpickup, isradionumberedit, isexternalcancel, showimmediatecancel, netpaytypes, paymentmethod, paymentmethoden, minutestowaitforpickup, carimagecolor1, carimagecolor2, carimagecolor3, carimagecolor4, carimagecolor5, carimagecolor6, carimagecolor7, carimagecolor8, carimagename1, carimagename2, carimagename3, carimagename4, carimagename5, carimagename6, carimagename7, carimagename8, replywatingminute, groupcompanies, communicationurl, orderurl, ordercancelurl, invaliddate, invalidreason, invaliddetailreason, acceptminor2, logoimage, displaysalescity, drivercontract_dispatchmethodid, drivercontract_ispreviewenabled, drivercontract_isenabled, drivercontract_useasdefault, drivercontract_onlyusewhennecessary, implementationcosts, monthlyminimumcharge, monthlyminimumcars, remarks, payablecommission, requeststartdate, requestcompanyidrelation, bankaccount, bankaccount2, www, destinationprefecture, destinationaddress, destinationpostalcode, destinationcontactname, destinationcompanyname, syncedtime) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{name}, #{account}, #{faretable}, #{jtxcompanyid}, #{appdisplayname}, #{status}, #{acceptmajor2}, ${dispatchtypeisexternaldispatch==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{dispatchtypepartnerapiversion}, #{phonenumber}, #{phonenumbercancel}, #{email}, #{warningemail}, #{companylogoimage}, #{areacode}, #{salesprefecture}, #{salesprefectureen}, #{salescity}, #{profile}, #{cars}, ${isenableclosing==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showdest==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showmoving==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showmustarrivaltime==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{showvisit}, ${showbookingcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{extendedfieldmap}, #{closingtimefrom}, #{closingtimeto}, #{globallat}, #{globallng}, #{companynameen}, #{displaysalescityen}, #{pickupfeedescription}, #{bookingfeedescription}, #{partnerapiversion}, ${showemptycar==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{ratingaverage}, #{waitforpickupdefault}, ${showminutestowaitforpickup==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${isradionumberedit==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${isexternalcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${showimmediatecancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{netpaytypes}, #{paymentmethod}, #{paymentmethoden}, #{minutestowaitforpickup}, #{carimagecolor1}, #{carimagecolor2}, #{carimagecolor3}, #{carimagecolor4}, #{carimagecolor5}, #{carimagecolor6}, #{carimagecolor7}, #{carimagecolor8}, #{carimagename1}, #{carimagename2}, #{carimagename3}, #{carimagename4}, #{carimagename5}, #{carimagename6}, #{carimagename7}, #{carimagename8}, #{replywatingminute}, #{groupcompanies}, #{communicationurl}, #{orderurl}, #{ordercancelurl}, #{invaliddate}, #{invalidreason}, #{invaliddetailreason}, #{acceptminor2}, #{logoimage}, #{displaysalescity}, #{drivercontractdispatchmethodid}, ${drivercontractispreviewenabled==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${drivercontractisenabled==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${drivercontractuseasdefault==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ${drivercontractonlyusewhennecessary==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{implementationcosts}, #{monthlyminimumcharge}, #{monthlyminimumcars}, #{remarks}, #{payablecommission}, #{requeststartdate}, #{requestcompanyidrelation}, #{bankaccount}, #{bankaccount2}, #{www}, #{destinationprefecture}, #{destinationaddress}, #{destinationpostalcode}, #{destinationcontactname}, #{destinationcompanyname}, #{syncedtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE appcompanysync SET name=#{name}, account=#{account}, jtxcompanyid=#{jtxcompanyid}, faretable=#{faretable}, appdisplayname=#{appdisplayname}, status=#{status}, acceptmajor2=#{acceptmajor2}, dispatchtype_isexternaldispatch=${dispatchtypeisexternaldispatch==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, dispatchtype_partnerapiversion=#{dispatchtypepartnerapiversion}, phonenumber=#{phonenumber}, phonenumbercancel=#{phonenumbercancel}, email=#{email}, warningemail=#{warningemail}, companylogoimage=#{companylogoimage}, areacode=#{areacode}, salesprefecture=#{salesprefecture}, salesprefectureen=#{salesprefectureen}, salescity=#{salescity}, profile=#{profile}, cars=#{cars}, isenableclosing=${isenableclosing==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showdest=${showdest==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showmoving=${showmoving==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showmustarrivaltime=${showmustarrivaltime==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showvisit=#{showvisit}, showbookingcancel=${showbookingcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, extendedfieldmap=#{extendedfieldmap}, closingtimefrom=#{closingtimefrom}, closingtimeto=#{closingtimeto}, globallat=#{globallat}, globallng=#{globallng}, companynameen=#{companynameen}, displaysalescityen=#{displaysalescityen}, pickupfeedescription=#{pickupfeedescription}, bookingfeedescription=#{bookingfeedescription}, partnerapiversion=#{partnerapiversion}, showemptycar=${showemptycar==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, ratingaverage=#{ratingaverage}, waitforpickupdefault=#{waitforpickupdefault}, showminutestowaitforpickup=${showminutestowaitforpickup==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, isradionumberedit=${isradionumberedit==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, isexternalcancel=${isexternalcancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, showimmediatecancel=${showimmediatecancel==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, netpaytypes=#{netpaytypes}, paymentmethod=#{paymentmethod}, paymentmethoden=#{paymentmethoden}, minutestowaitforpickup=#{minutestowaitforpickup}, carimagecolor1=#{carimagecolor1}, carimagecolor2=#{carimagecolor2}, carimagecolor3=#{carimagecolor3}, carimagecolor4=#{carimagecolor4}, carimagecolor5=#{carimagecolor5}, carimagecolor6=#{carimagecolor6}, carimagecolor7=#{carimagecolor7}, carimagecolor8=#{carimagecolor8}, carimagename1=#{carimagename1}, carimagename2=#{carimagename2}, carimagename3=#{carimagename3}, carimagename4=#{carimagename4}, carimagename5=#{carimagename5}, carimagename6=#{carimagename6}, carimagename7=#{carimagename7}, carimagename8=#{carimagename8}, replywatingminute=#{replywatingminute}, groupcompanies=#{groupcompanies}, communicationurl=#{communicationurl}, orderurl=#{orderurl}, ordercancelurl=#{ordercancelurl}, invaliddate=#{invaliddate}, invalidreason=#{invalidreason}, invaliddetailreason=#{invaliddetailreason}, acceptminor2=#{acceptminor2}, logoimage=#{logoimage}, displaysalescity=#{displaysalescity}, drivercontract_dispatchmethodid=#{drivercontractdispatchmethodid}, drivercontract_ispreviewenabled=${drivercontractispreviewenabled==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, drivercontract_isenabled=${drivercontractisenabled==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, drivercontract_useasdefault=${drivercontractuseasdefault==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, drivercontract_onlyusewhennecessary=${drivercontractonlyusewhennecessary==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, implementationcosts=#{implementationcosts}, monthlyminimumcharge=#{monthlyminimumcharge}, monthlyminimumcars=#{monthlyminimumcars}, remarks=#{remarks}, payablecommission=#{payablecommission}, requeststartdate=#{requeststartdate}, requestcompanyidrelation=#{requestcompanyidrelation}, bankaccount=#{bankaccount}, bankaccount2=#{bankaccount2}, www=#{www}, destinationprefecture=#{destinationprefecture}, destinationaddress=#{destinationaddress}, destinationpostalcode=#{destinationpostalcode}, destinationcontactname=#{destinationcontactname}, destinationcompanyname=#{destinationcompanyname}, syncedtime=#{syncedtime} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.select: select app.sfid as sfid, app.jtxcompanyid as jtxCompanyId, app.appdisplayname, app.acceptmajor2, app.acceptminor2, app.dispatchtype as dispatchtype, app.phonenumber, app.phonenumbercancel, app.email, app.warningemail, app.companylogoimage, app.salescity, app.profile, app.cars, app.isenableclosing, app.displaysalescity, app.showdest, app.showmoving, app.showmustarrivaltime, app.showvisit, app.showbookingcancel, app.extendedfieldmap, to_char(closingTimeFrom, 'HH24:MI:SS'):: VARCHAR as closingTimeFrom, to_char(closingTimeTo, 'HH24:MI:SS'):: VARCHAR as closingTimeTo, app.globallat, app.globallng, app.companynameen, app.displaysalescityen, app.pickupfeedescription as pickupFeeDescriptionEN, app.bookingfeedescription as bookingFeeDescriptionEn, app.partnerapiversion, app.showemptycar, app.ratingaverage, app.waitforpickupdefault, app.showminutestowaitforpickup, app.isradionumberedit as isRadioNumberEdit, app.isexternalcancel as isExternalCancel, app.showimmediatecancel, app.netpaytypes, paymentmethod, app.minutestowaitforpickup, app.logoimage, app.replywatingminute, app.groupcompanies, app.communicationurl, app.orderurl, app.ordercancelurl, app.areaCode, app.salesprefecture, app.driverContract, app.implementationcosts, app.monthlyminimumcharge, app.monthlyminimumcars, app.remarks, app.payablecommission, COALESCE(to_char(app.requeststartdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS requeststartdate, app.requestcompanyidrelation, app.www as website, f.sfid as fbsfid, f.pickupfare, f.firstsquaredistance, f.firstsquarefare, f.additionaldistance, f.additionalfare, f.reservationfee, f.pickupfeeexistence, f.pickupfeedescription as fbpickupfeedescription, f.bookingfeeexistence, f.bookingfeedescription as fbbookingfeedescription, bm.bankcode as bankacc_bankcode, bm.banknamekana as bankacc_banknamekana, bm.branchCode as bankacc_branchCode, bm.branchnamekana as bankacc_branchnamekana, bankacc.accounttype as bankacc_accounttype, bankacc.accountnumber as bankacc_accountnumber, bankacc.accountnamekana as bankacc_accountnamekana, bm2.bankcode as bankacc2_bankcode, bm2.banknamekana as bankacc2_banknamekana, bm2.branchCode as bankacc2_branchCode, bm2.branchnamekana as bankacc2_branchnamekana, bankacc2.accounttype as bankacc2_accounttype, bankacc2.accountnumber as bankacc2_accountnumber, bankacc2.accountnamekana as bankacc2_accountnamekana, app.paymentmethoden as paymentmethoden, app.salesprefectureen as salesprefectureen, app.destinationprefecture as destinationprefecture, app.destinationaddress as destinationaddress, app.destinationpostalcode as destinationpostalcode, app.destinationcontactname as destinationcontactname, app.destinationcompanyname as destinationcompanyname, app.carimagename1 as carimagename1, app.carimagename2 as carimagename2, app.carimagename3, app.carimagename4, app.carimagename5, app.carimagename6, app.carimagename7, app.carimagename8, app.carimagecolor1, app.carimagecolor2, app.carimagecolor3, app.carimagecolor4, app.carimagecolor5, app.carimagecolor6, app.carimagecolor7, app.carimagecolor8 FROM appcompany app LEFT JOIN faretable f ON app.faretable = f.sfid LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformation bankacc ON app.bankaccount = bankacc.sfid LEFT OUTER JOIN bankmaster bm ON bankacc.accountbank = bm.sfid LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformation bankacc2 ON app.bankaccount2 = bankacc2.sfid LEFT JOIN bankmaster bm2 ON bankacc2.accountbank = bm2.sfid WHERE app.sfid=#{sfid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT app.sfid as sfid, appmaster.dispatchtype, app.jtxcompanyid as jtxcompanyid, app.appdisplayname, app.acceptmajor2, app.acceptminor2, app.phonenumber, app.phonenumbercancel, app.email, app.warningemail, app.companylogoimage, app.areacode as areaCode, app.salesprefecture as salesPrefecture, app.salescity, app.profile, app.cars, app.isenableclosing, app.displaysalescity, app.showdest, app.showmoving, app.showmustarrivaltime, app.showvisit, app.showbookingcancel, app.extendedfieldmap, TO_CHAR(app.closingtimefrom:: time, 'HH24:MI:SS') as closingtimefrom, TO_CHAR(app.closingtimeto:: time, 'HH24:MI:SS') as closingtimeto, app.globallat as globallat, app.globallng as globallng, app.companynameen, app.displaysalescityen, app.pickupfeedescription as pickupfeedescriptionen, app.bookingfeedescription as bookingfeedescriptionen, app.partnerapiversion, app.showemptycar, app.ratingaverage, app.waitforpickupdefault, app.showminutestowaitforpickup, app.isradionumberedit, app.isexternalcancel, app.showimmediatecancel, app.netpaytypes, app.drivercontract_dispatchmethodid as drivercontractdispatchmethodid, app.drivercontract_isenabled as driverContractIsenabled, app.drivercontract_ispreviewenabled as drivercontractispreviewenabled, app.drivercontract_useasdefault as drivercontractuseasdefault, app.drivercontract_onlyusewhennecessary as drivercontractonlyusewhennecessary, app.dispatchtype_isexternaldispatch as isExternalDispatchDispatchType, app.dispatchtype_partnerapiversion as partnerApiVersionDispatchType, app.implementationcosts as implementationCosts, app.monthlyminimumcharge as monthlyMinimumCharge, app.monthlyminimumcars as monthlyMinimumCars, app.remarks as remarks, app.payablecommission as payableCommission, COALESCE(to_char(app.requeststartdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS requestStartDate, app.requestcompanyidrelation as requestcompanyidrelation, app.paymentmethod, app.minutestowaitforpickup, app.replywatingminute, app.groupcompanies, CASE WHEN appmaster.dispatchtype = 'V3.5' THEN app.communicationurl ELSE '' END AS communicationurl, CASE WHEN appmaster.dispatchtype = 'V3.5' THEN app.orderurl ELSE '' END AS orderurl, CASE WHEN appmaster.dispatchtype = 'V3.5' THEN app.ordercancelurl ELSE '' END AS ordercancelurl, f.sfid as fbsfid, f.pickupfare, f.firstsquaredistance, f.firstsquarefare, f.additionaldistance, f.additionalfare, f.reservationfee, f.pickupfeeexistence::int8 as pickupfeeexistence, f.pickupfeedescription as fbpickupfeedescription, f.bookingfeeexistence::int8 as bookingfeeexistence, f.bookingfeedescription as fbbookingfeedescription, app.Www as website, bm.bankcode as bankacc_bankcode, bm.banknamekana as bankacc_banknamekana, bm.branchCode as bankacc_branchCode, bm.branchnamekana as bankacc_branchnamekana, bankacc.accounttype as bankacc_accounttype, bankacc.accountnumber as bankacc_accountnumber, bankacc.accountnamekana as bankacc_accountnamekana, bm2.bankcode as bankacc2_bankcode, bm2.banknamekana as bankacc2_banknamekana, bm2.branchCode as bankacc2_branchCode, bm2.branchnamekana as bankacc2_branchnamekana, bankacc2.accounttype as bankacc2_accounttype, bankacc2.accountnumber as bankacc2_accountnumber, bankacc2.accountnamekana as bankacc2_accountnamekana, app.paymentmethoden as paymentmethoden, app.salesprefectureen as salesprefectureen, concat(app.destinationprefecture, app.destinationaddress) as destinationaddress, app.destinationpostalcode as destinationpostalcode, app.destinationcontactname as destinationcontactname, app.destinationcompanyname as destinationcompanyname, CONCAT('', CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor1), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor1, '.', app.carimagename1, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor2), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor2, '.', app.carimagename2, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor3), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor3, '.', app.carimagename3, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor4), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor4, '.', app.carimagename4, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor5), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor5, '.', app.carimagename5, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor6), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor6, '.', app.carimagename6, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor7), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor7, '.', app.carimagename7, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor8), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor8, '.', app.carimagename8, '') ELSE '' END ) as carImage, app.carimagecolor1, app.carimagecolor2, app.carimagecolor3, app.carimagecolor4, app.carimagecolor5, app.carimagecolor6, app.carimagecolor7, app.carimagecolor8 FROM appcompanysync app LEFT JOIN appcompany appmaster ON app.sfid = appmaster.sfid LEFT JOIN faretablesync f ON app.faretable = f.sfid LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync bankacc ON app.bankaccount = bankacc.sfid AND bankacc.accountcategory = '口座引落' LEFT OUTER JOIN bankmastersync bm ON bankacc.accountbank = bm.sfid LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync bankacc2 ON app.bankaccount2 = bankacc2.sfid AND bankacc2.accountcategory = 'その他（空転補填・タクエボ等）支払' LEFT OUTER JOIN bankmastersync bm2 ON bankacc2.accountbank = bm2.sfid WHERE app.sfid=#{sfid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT app.sfid as sfid, app.jtxcompanyid as jtxcompanyid, app.appdisplayname, app.acceptmajor2, app.acceptminor2, app.dispatchtype_isexternaldispatch as dispatchtypeisexternaldispatch, app.dispatchtype_partnerapiversion as dispatchtypepartnerapiversion, app.phonenumber, app.phonenumbercancel, app.email, app.warningemail, app.companylogoimage, app.areacode, app.salescity, app.profile, app.cars, app.isenableclosing, app.displaysalescity, app.showdest, app.showmoving, app.showmustarrivaltime, app.showvisit, app.showbookingcancel, app.extendedfieldmap, TO_CHAR(app.closingtimefrom:: time, 'HH24:MI:SS') as closingtimefrom, TO_CHAR(app.closingtimeto:: time, 'HH24:MI:SS') as closingtimeto, app.globallat, app.globallng, app.companynameen, app.displaysalescityen, app.pickupfeedescription as pickupfeedescriptionen, app.bookingfeedescription as bookingFeeDescriptionen, app.partnerapiversion, app.showemptycar, app.ratingaverage, app.waitforpickupdefault, app.showminutestowaitforpickup, app.isradionumberedit, app.isexternalcancel, app.showimmediatecancel, app.netpaytypes, app.paymentmethod as paymentmethod, app.minutestowaitforpickup, app.logoimage, app.replywatingminute, app.groupcompanies, app.communicationurl, app.orderurl, app.ordercancelurl, app.payablecommission, app.implementationcosts, app.monthlyMinimumCharge, app.monthlyMinimumCars, COALESCE(to_char(app.requeststartdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS requestStartDate, app.remarks, app.requestcompanyidrelation, app.drivercontract_dispatchmethodid as drivercontractdispatchmethodid, app.drivercontract_isenabled as driverContractIsenabled, app.drivercontract_ispreviewenabled as drivercontractispreviewenabled, app.drivercontract_useasdefault as drivercontractuseasdefault, app.drivercontract_onlyusewhennecessary as drivercontractonlyusewhennecessary, app.dispatchtype_isexternaldispatch as isExternalDispatchDispatchType, app.dispatchtype_partnerapiversion as partnerApiVersionDispatchType, app.areacode as areaCode, app.salesprefecture as salesPrefecture, app.www as website, app.paymentmethoden as paymentmethoden, app.salesprefectureen as salesprefectureen, f.sfid as fbsfid, f.pickupfare as pickupfee, f.firstsquaredistance as uponentrymeter, f.firstsquarefare as uponentryfare, f.additionaldistance as unitmeter, f.additionalfare as unitfare, f.reservationfee as bookingfee, f.pickupfeeexistence as pickupFeeExistence, f.pickupfeedescription as pickupfeedescription, f.bookingfeeexistence as bookingfeeexistence, f.bookingfeedescription as bookingfeedescription, app.destinationprefecture as destinationprefecture, app.destinationaddress as destinationaddress, app.destinationpostalcode as destinationpostalcode, app.destinationcontactname as destinationcontactname, app.destinationcompanyname as destinationcompanyname, bm.banknamekana as bankacc_bankNameKana, bm.bankcode as bankacc_bankCode, bm.branchnamekana AS bankacc_branchNameKana, bm.branchcode as bankacc_branchCode, bankacc.sfid as bankaccsfid, bankacc.accountname as bankacc_accountName, bankacc.accountnumber AS bankacc_accountNumber, bankacc.accountnamekana AS bankacc_accountNameKana, bankacc.accounttype as bankacc_accountType, bm2.banknamekana as bankacc2_bankNameKana, bm2.bankcode as bankacc2_bankCode, bm2.branchnamekana AS bankacc2_branchNameKana, bm2.branchcode as bankacc2_branchCode, bankacc2.sfid as bankacc2sfid, bankacc2.accountname as bankacc2_accountName, bankacc2.accountnumber AS bankacc2_accountNumber, bankacc2.accountnamekana AS bankacc2_accountNameKana, bankacc2.accounttype as bankacc2_accountType, acc.mertermno as mertermno, apps.dispatchtype as dispatchtype, apps.driverContract as drivercontract, CONCAT('', CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor1), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor1, '.', app.carimagename1, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor2), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor2, '.', app.carimagename2, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor3), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor3, '.', app.carimagename3, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor4), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor4, '.', app.carimagename4, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor5), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor5, '.', app.carimagename5, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor6), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor6, '.', app.carimagename6, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor7), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor7, '.', app.carimagename7, ',') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN coalesce(TRIM(app.carimagecolor8), '') != '' THEN concat(app.carimagecolor8, '.', app.carimagename8, '') ELSE '' END ) as carImage FROM appcompanysync app LEFT JOIN faretablesync f ON app.faretable = f.sfid LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync bankacc ON app.bankaccount = bankacc.sfid AND bankacc.accountcategory = '口座引落' LEFT OUTER JOIN bankmastersync bm ON bankacc.accountbank = bm.sfid LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync bankacc2 ON app.bankaccount2 = bankacc2.sfid AND bankacc2.accountcategory = 'その他（空転補填・タクエボ等）支払' LEFT OUTER JOIN bankmastersync bm2 ON bankacc2.accountbank = bm2.sfid LEFT JOIN accountsync acc ON app.account = acc.sfid LEFT JOIN appcompany apps On app.sfid = apps.sfid WHERE app.sfid=#{sfid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
